notes.note: Initial setup. Excluding generic industry articles by default.
Inspire11 is the one to watch

Feedback session: scanner was too focused on fractional AI leadership, missing the integration layer positioning. Rewrote queries to target vendor-neutral AI integration for mid-market/emerging CPG. Sharpened scoring — enterprise CPG now scores near zero. Excluded enterprise firms (Accenture, Sigmoid, Tredence, Fractal, Alpha Apex, EightX) and global consultancy domains.
